intent: Keep the photo believable, clean, and close to the original scene while correcting exposure, white balance, and mild color issues.

tone_guidance.brightness: match the real scene, lift only when the photo is visibly underexposed
tone_guidance.highlights: protect detail instead of making the frame look flat
tone_guidance.shadows: open enough to show context without losing depth

color_guidance.white_balance: neutral to slightly warm when skin or food is present
color_guidance.skin: healthy and believable, avoid green or orange casts

parameter_strategy: Agent must infer concrete values per photo from preview analysis. Use this card as direction, not as a fixed preset.
